rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE clauses
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not generate unsafe clauses for Boolean data range comparisons without numeric scalar representation
